name: flipblog
description: FlipBlog — a flippable, book-style blog publishing platform with an admin dashboard.

scripts.test: npm run test --workspace flipblog-server && npm run test --workspace flipblog-web
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('server/data',{recursive:true,force:true})" && playwright test
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace flipblog-server && npm run lint --workspace flipblog-web
